author: gaxanh
content: I looked through the latest draft and noticed that the 7702 is still refilled into `state_gas_reservoir` instead of `intrinsic_state_gas`?

author: misilva73
content: It needs to be. Otherwise intrinsic cost depend on state, which we want to avoid

author: gaxanh
content: I also want to discuss 8038, there are still many issues surrounding it, but there isn't a chat group for it here.
